x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: High customization density on core tables creates risk of Now Assist conflicts during enablement. This composite score aggregates business rule, client script, and UI action counts to estimate deployment risk.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Review the customization risk score and address high-risk items before Now Assist enablement. Focus on Business Rules that fire on insert/update of task, incident, and change_request. Document all customizations for the Now Assist configuration team.
